payload:
Work through HYPOTHESES.yml autonomously. Pick the lowest-priority open node with satisfied dependencies, run the full experiment cycle, review it,    
  integrate or kill, then immediately pick up the next node. When multiple independent nodes are eligible, run them in parallel. BASELINE-FIRST: always check references/ 
  and grounding repos before implementing — build on existing code, especially Qwen3-Coder-Next and Qwen3.5. Never reinvent what exists in references/. Keep going until  
  al... [truncated, 540 chars total]

Two p=11 experiments proven: (1) exp_parallel_block_capsules - parallel blocks show -0.39pp improvement, 30% faster fine-tuning. (2) exp_pure_linear_composition - pure-linear only +1.02% degradation (threshold 5%), linear attention does NOT need full attention scaffolding.

Two p=11 experiments proven: (1) exp_parallel_block_capsules - parallel blocks show -0.39pp composition improvement, 30% faster fine-tuning, 3 seeds. (2) exp_pure_linear_composition - pure-linear only +1.02% vs hybrid (threshold 5%), scaffolding hypothesis falsified, 7 seeds. Both PAPER.md written.

Two p=11 experiments reviewed (both PROCEED) and integrated: (1) exp_parallel_block_capsules - parallel blocks composition-compatible, 30% faster, not statistically superior. (2) exp_pure_linear_composition - scaffolding hypothesis falsified, pure-linear +1.02% vs hybrid, lower interference. 2 new hypotheses added: parallel+pure-linear combined (p=12), linear state capacity scaling (p=13).

3 parallel p=11 experiments complete: (1) exp_splay_adaptive_routing KILLED — splay overhead +51.5%, gradient descent recalibrates 7 gates faster than EMA. (2) exp_minimal_graft_recalibration PROVEN — selective root+graft-point recalibration recovers 99.8% of all-gates quality at 43% parameter cost. (3) exp_split_freeze_protocol PROVEN — split-and-freeze contribution protocol works for tree experts.

exp_split_freeze_protocol needs 3 fixes: (1) KC1 does not test actual split_leaf() mechanism - relabel as warm-start vs cold-start or invoke split_leaf(). (2) Clarify overlap with subtree_grafting calibration findings. (3) Report per-seed KC2 V2 numbers. Also handled: exp_splay_adaptive_routing KILL confirmed and integrated to FINDINGS.md. exp_minimal_graft_recalibration PROCEED confirmed and review added to FINDINGS.md.

exp_split_freeze_protocol REVISED: (1) KC1 relabeled warm-start vs cold-start (split_leaf never invoked), (2) subtree_grafting overlap made prominent, (3) per-seed V2 robustness note added (values not preserved in logs). Ready for re-review.

exp_split_freeze_protocol PROCEED: warm-start neutral (-0.03%), freeze viable with right-tree calibration (+0.09%). 2 new nodes: exp_split_leaf_actual (test actual split mechanism), exp_sequential_freeze_graft (N>2 sequential protocol).

3 parallel p=12 experiments ALL PROVEN: (1) exp_lsh_capsule_routing: LSH beats softmax -0.56%, zero routing params, T=1 sufficient; (2) exp20_death_recovery_mechanism: upstream freeze reduces revival 79-85%, L0 dominates downstream survival, revival strictly feed-forward; (3) exp_parallel_pure_linear_combined: combined parallel+pure-linear +1.48% gap (threshold 5%), additive effects, simplest composition-safe block validated.

exp_parallel_pure_linear_combined: PROCEED, integrated. exp_lsh_capsule_routing: REVISE (blocking: add softmax-no-balance-loss control, add uniform routing baseline; non-blocking: correct FLOP table, isotropy assumption, paired stats, soften language). exp20_death_recovery_mechanism: REVISE (verify embedding freeze, explain 97.3% vs 12.6% discrepancy, report S=100 dead counts, fix upstream/downstream code, soften confirmed to strongly supported, exclude L0 self-revival).

REVISE round complete. exp_lsh_capsule_routing: all 6 fixes applied, 7 configs tested (softmax, softmax_no_bal, uniform, LSH T=1/2/4/8), routing quality irrelevant at micro scale (1.34% spread, no p<0.05), status→proven. exp20_death_recovery_mechanism: all 6 fixes applied (embedding freeze verified, 97.3% discrepancy explained by offsetting new deaths, S=100 dead counts added, upstream/downstream separated, language softened, L0 excluded), 79-94% reduction confirmed, status→proven.

Integrated exp_lsh_capsule_routing (proven, null result: routing irrelevant at G=8 micro scale) and exp20_death_recovery_mechanism (proven, 79-94% revival reduction via inter-layer coupling). Both passed post-revision adversarial review. 2 new hypotheses: freeze-then-prune protocol (p13), LSH diverse routing (p14). FINDINGS.md, HYPOTHESES.yml, VISION.md updated.

Round 4 parallel p=12: all 4 PASS. (1) exp_l2_norm_value_boundedness: value norms max 1.09x growth, r<0.33 correlation (thresholds 10x/0.5). (2) exp_n5_identity_scaling: J=0.792 at N=5 (threshold 0.70), safe limit ~N=8. (3) exp_prune_before_compose_e2e: +0.01% vs baseline (threshold 2%), pre-composition pruning validated. (4) exp_shared_layer0_pool: sharing improves quality 1.7-3.0%, 8.1% param savings, should be default protocol.

shared_layer0_pool: 4 fixes required. (1) reconcile double-counting with loudness falsification, (2) weaken default-protocol claim to zero-shot only, (3) recommend average not first strategy, (4) add capacity-reduction alt explanation. 3 other experiments (l2_norm_value_boundedness, n5_identity_scaling, prune_before_compose_e2e) PROCEED and integrated. 3 new hypothesis nodes added.

shared_layer0_pool revised: 4 fixes applied — (1) loudness reconciliation added to MATH.md+PAPER.md, (2) default-protocol claim weakened to zero-shot only, (3) average recommended over first as principled strategy, (4) capacity-reduction alt explanation added as limitation 7. No code changes, documentation-only revision.

shared_layer0_pool proven: sharing Layer 0 improves zero-shot composition 1.7-3.0%, 8.1% param savings. 2 follow-up nodes generated (calibrated comparison, N=5 scaling). Round 4 complete — all 4 parallel experiments integrated.

## Reason
consecutive_failures

## Status
Too many consecutive failures.

## Summary
- Iterations: 19
- Duration: 2h 53m 7s
- Exit code: 1
